title: Pebeo 100ml Deco Spray, Acrylic, Glitter Gold, 10.5 x 5.2 x 5.2 cm, 093793
features: Water based colours (except chrome colours) in spray for most surface. Unique composition that combines very low-odour hydro soluble resins with very high quality pigments
Drying takes about 15 minutes to the touch, completely dry in 12 hours.
Can be used on a variety of surfaces
6 effects- matt (27 colours), gloss (5 colours), fluorescent (3 colours), glitter (3 colours), chrome (2 colours) and pearl (8 colours).
description: From the manufacturer Deco Spray The DecoSpray range is ideal for all decorative projects, renovation work and surfaces with difficult access. Highly pigmented High quality fluid acrylic decorative paint, the Deco range allows total opacity for decoration on multiple surfaces. Suitable for renovation work and surfaces with difficult access 48 colours available Opaque and covering colours, low odour. Finishes available: pearlescent, glossy, matt, glitter, fluorescent, chrome, chalk, stone, blackboard, etc. Ideal for renovation DecoSpray products can be used on many surfaces: thick paper, cardboard, papier-mâché, plastic, wood, metal, terracotta, plaster, ceramics, glass, stone, canvas, polystyrene, dry flowers... (note: for textiles, use our 7A Spray paint range) Deco Fluid Deco Cream Deco Spray Deco Spray Buying Options Buying Options Buying Options Buying Options Customer Reviews 4.5 out of 5 stars 3,320 4.5 out of 5 stars 1,356 4.1 out of 5 stars 1,253 4.3 out of 5 stars 1,204 Capacity 45 ml 120 ml 100 ml 200 ml Available colours 77 Colours 55 Colours 48 Colours 48 Colours Texture Fluid Creamy Fluid Spray Fluid Spray Multi-support ✓ ✓ ✓ ✓ Pigmentation ✓ ✓ ✓ ✓ Advice for use Shake the spray well before use. Apply directly to the spray. The diffuser is the "brush" of the spray and as such must be maintained. To do this, purge the can after each use by emptying the can upside down. Apply to a clean and degreased surface. For best results on porous surfaces such as untreated wood, we recommend using decoSpray Gesso white or black as an undercoat. Hold the spray can upright during use. Paint stains can be removed with soap and water within the first 20-25 minutes after application. Once completely dry (12 hours), decoSpray is indelible, permanent and weatherproof (outdoor use).
